title: rubus hirtus var. tenuiglandulosus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. tenuiglandulosus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a variant of the Rubus hirtus plant, a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. tenuiglandulosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to support overall well-being.
